scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @nexvoy/types build && pnpm --filter @nexvoy/design-tokens build && pnpm --filter @nexvoy/core build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @nexvoy/types typecheck && pnpm --filter @nexvoy/design-tokens typecheck && pnpm --filter @nexvoy/core typecheck && pnpm --filter nexvoy-app typecheck
